title: Crocodile Reveals His Cruelty
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on crocodile reveals his cruelty, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Crocodile Reveals His Cruelty. Crocodile toys with Vivi and the Straw Hats while his agents move the plan toward full civil war. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What was that!? You think you can treat me like an idiot!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: H-hold on there, Nami or you'll really make him angry...!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Ah, welcome at last, Princess Vivi-

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: You've done a splendid job avoiding my assessing and making it all the way here.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'd come all the way to the ends of the earth,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If it meant seeing your death,

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I'm afraid the only thing dying you'll see is your worthless country, Ms. Wednesday...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If it just weren't for you, a this country would still have its peace!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: No, VIVI! Open this cage first!

summary: This part develops crocodile reveals his cruelty and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
